rules.name: allow-web-search
rules.description: Allow web searches using the web_search tool.
rules.principle: The agent may perform web searches to find information.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits web searches.

rules.name: allow-fetch-news-sites
rules.description: Allow fetching web content from popular news sites.
rules.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular news sites.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits fetching content from popular news sites.

rules.name: allow-fetch-development-sites
rules.description: Allow fetching web content from popular development sites.
rules.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular development sites.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits fetching content from popular development sites.

rules.name: escalate-fetch-other-urls
rules.description: Escalate fetching content from any other URL not explicitly permitted.
rules.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular news sites and popular development sites; all other URLs require human judgment.
rules.reason: URL is not in an explicitly permitted category; requires human approval.

rules.name: allow-downloads-read
rules.description: Allow reading files in the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading in the Downloads folder.

rules.name: allow-downloads-write
rules.description: Allow writing files in the Downloads folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits writing in the Downloads folder.

rules.name: allow-downloads-move-source
rules.description: Allow move operations where the source (delete-path) is within Downloads.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Constitution permits delete/move operations within the Downloads folder.

rules.name: allow-documents-read
rules.description: Allow reading documents in the Users document folder.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read documents in the Users document folder.
rules.reason: Constitution explicitly permits reading in the Documents folder.

rules.name: allow-read-file-info-anywhere
rules.description: Allow listing directories and getting file metadata for any readable path.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read documents in the Users document folder and perform git operations within the sandbox.
rules.reason: Read-only metadata and directory listing tools are safe to allow broadly to support agent navigation.

rules.name: allow-list-allowed-directories
rules.description: Allow calling list_allowed_directories which has no path arguments.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read documents in the Users document folder.
rules.reason: list_allowed_directories has no path arguments and is a safe informational call.

rules.name: escalate-write-outside-permitted
rules.description: Escalate write operations outside permitted directories (Downloads, sandbox).
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Writes outside the Downloads folder or sandbox require human approval.

rules.name: escalate-delete-outside-permitted
rules.description: Escalate delete/move-source operations outside permitted directories.
rules.principle: The agent is allowed to read, write and delete content in the Downloads folder.
rules.reason: Delete operations outside the Downloads folder or sandbox require human approval.

rules.name: github-read-operations-allow
rules.description: Allow all read-only GitHub operations (listing, searching, reading issues, PRs, repos, code, comments, reviews).
rules.principle: The agent may freely list, search, and read GitHub resources (issues, pull requests, repositories, code, comments, reviews) without human approval.
rules.reason: These tools are purely read-only and the constitution explicitly permits free access to GitHub read operations.

rules.name: github-issue-write-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for creating or updating GitHub issues.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Writing or modifying issues is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-add-issue-comment-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for adding comments to issues or pull requests.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Adding a comment is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-add-comment-to-pending-review-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for adding review comments to a pending pull request review.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Adding a review comment is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-add-reply-to-pr-comment-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for replying to pull request comments.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Replying to a PR comment is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-assign-copilot-to-issue-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for assigning Copilot to an issue.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Assigning Copilot to an issue may create a PR and is a mutating operation requiring human approval.

rules.name: github-create-branch-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for creating new branches in GitHub repositories.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a branch is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-create-or-update-file-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for creating or updating files in GitHub repositories.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Creating or updating a file is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-create-pull-request-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for creating pull requests.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a pull request is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-create-repository-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for creating new GitHub repositories.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Creating a repository is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-delete-file-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for deleting files from GitHub repositories.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Deleting a file is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-fork-repository-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for forking GitHub repositories.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Forking a repository is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-merge-pull-request-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for merging pull requests.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Merging a pull request is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-pull-request-review-write-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for creating, submitting, or deleting pull request reviews.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Writing a PR review is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-push-files-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for pushing files to GitHub repositories.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Pushing files is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-request-copilot-review-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for requesting Copilot code reviews on pull requests.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Requesting a Copilot review modifies the PR and requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-sub-issue-write-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for adding, removing, or reprioritizing sub-issues.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Modifying sub-issue relationships is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-update-pull-request-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for updating pull request metadata.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Updating a pull request is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

rules.name: github-update-pull-request-branch-escalate
rules.description: Require human approval for updating a pull request's head branch.
rules.principle: Creating, updating, closing, or deleting GitHub resources (issues, PRs, comments, reviews, branches, files, repositories) requires human approval.
rules.reason: Updating a PR branch is a mutating GitHub operation that requires human approval per the constitution.

listDefinitions.name: popular-news-sites
listDefinitions.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular news sites.
listDefinitions.generationPrompt: List the domains of approximately 30–50 widely recognized, popular news and media outlets (e.g., major national newspapers, broadcasters, and online news publications) from around the world.

listDefinitions.name: popular-development-sites
listDefinitions.principle: The agent may fetch web content from popular development sites.
listDefinitions.generationPrompt: List the domains of approximately 30–50 widely used software development and technical reference sites, including code hosting, documentation, package registries, developer forums, and technical blogs (e.g., github.com, stackoverflow.com, docs.python.org, npmjs.com, developer.mozilla.org).

skippedServers.reason: The user guidance contains no mention of Google Workspace, Google Drive, Google Sheets, Google Docs, Gmail, or Google Calendar. All the permissions listed relate to local filesystem operations (Downloads, Documents folders), git operations, web content fetching, and GitHub resources. None of these map to the google-workspace server's capabilities.
